name: sfdc-transcript-mcp
description: Turn a sales call transcript into human-approved Salesforce Opportunity updates.
long_description: Reads a meeting transcript and proposes Salesforce Opportunity field updates for you to review and approve. Connects to your own org via a browser login (no consumer key or field allow-list to configure). The model proposes, the server validates, and nothing is written without your confirmation — every change is shown as a dry-run preview with the verbatim quote behind it.

tools.name: connect_salesforce
tools.description: Log in to Salesforce in the browser (no key needed).

tools.name: auth_status
tools.description: Show cached connections and token validity.

tools.name: find_opportunity
tools.description: Find the Opportunity a meeting is about, by name.

tools.name: list_opportunity_fields
tools.description: List updateable Opportunity fields with the focus set + help text.

tools.name: update_field_focus
tools.description: Add/remove focus fields and notes (persists per org; writes nothing to Salesforce).

tools.name: suggest_updates
tools.description: Parse a transcript and return candidate field updates with current values.

tools.name: apply_update
tools.description: Validate proposals, then dry-run (default) or write with confirmation. Logs an audit entry.
